title: Unknown node in split color() map on empty if

features.name: function with if-else returning through reg variables
features.description: Code should include a function that uses if-else to assign values to internal reg variables which are then used to compute the function return value

features.name: multi_bit_equality_comparison_with_macro_constant
features.description: Code should include a comparison of a multi-bit signal against a macro-defined constant of equal width where the macro is defined with explicit width literal

features.name: variable_bit_slice_in_function_call
features.description: Code should include a function called with arguments using variable bit slice syntax (start +: width) in an always @(*) combinational block
